name: DPH Gendamoore
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｄ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ディー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｐ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ピー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ａ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ジャンダムーア
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this card is Synchro Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 Level 4 Cyberse monster from your GY in Defense Position, but negate its effects, also you cannot Special Summon for the rest of this turn, except Cyberse monsters. When your Cyberse monster battles an opponent's monster and inflicts battle damage to them: You can banish this card from your GY; inflict that much damage to your opponent. You can only use each effect of "DPH Gendamoore" once per turn.

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
mst: Negates the effects of the Summoned monsters
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Restricts the player's Special Summons to Type specific monsters
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
